summary: SINGLE_FOCUS Axes with BLUE curve f(x)=x³-2x-5 on [1,3]. GREEN Dot at true root x* ≈ 2.0946. 5 Newton iterations from x₀=2.5: at each step a YELLOW x-axis Dot + GREY_B DashedLine + RED Dot on curve + ORANGE tangent Line Extending to next x-axis YELLOW Dot. Right log table shows (iter, x_n, |x_n-x*|) with errors dropping 1.4→0.13→7e-3→3e-5→3e-10 — quadratic convergence visible in the exponent roughly doubling per step. YELLOW bottom caption reinforces the quadratic rate.
